title: The Skull Dome Battle Spreads
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Chopper, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Yamato as Battles spread through the Skull Dome while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the alliance shift the momentum.
scene: Across the Skull Dome, the alliance fights to survive while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the Straw Hats change the flow of battle.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There are tens of thousands on this floor...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It would be impossible to administer an injection to them one by one.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And synthetic- sized my own counter virus based on your methods!!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: It's your foul virus against mine!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This means the cure is inhalable so everyone can be treated sinful- takeously!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How did a second rate pirate like you...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Our crew was once scattered across the entire world, but we all used that time to HONE OUR SKILLS!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who the hell asked you to butt in anyway?! You even went and cured my subordinates!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're bound to lose control of them even- Tually!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm not gonna listen to a lecture from a Tauki!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who the hell do you think I am?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WHAT are you Doing?! Get out of the way!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We'd rather die protectec- ting our Saviour...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: than continue serving a crazy boss like you!! Isn't that right boys?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Now, give him your best shot!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: But let's get one thing straight!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Above every floor of the castle.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Momo- suke, are you alright in there?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Everyone is expecting so much from me,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: But I'm a weak, pathetic, spoiled fool!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I really hate being like this.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Momo- Suke-Sama, You're a splendid young man!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 54 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
